name: Nats
description: This Test Connection validates the access against the NATS server and basic metadata extraction of JetStream streams as topics.

steps.name: GetTopics
steps.description: List all the JetStream streams available on the NATS server.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch streams, please validate the NATS server URL and credentials, and ensure JetStream is enabled.

steps.name: CheckSchemaKvBucket
steps.description: Validate that the configured JetStream KV bucket for schemas exists and is accessible.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to access the Schema KV bucket. Please ensure JetStream is enabled and the bucket name is correct.
